title: Super Block World (Forge)
description: New content based on Super Mario, including mobs, items, blocks and a dimension.
body:
Super Block World is a mod that aims to bring content from Super Mario to Minecraft, this includes blocks, mobs, items and a new dimension.

For information on the mod, such as how to enter the dimension, check out the Wiki!

### Credits

**dayofpi** - Lead programming

**IridaceaeArt** - Music

**kjolt947** - Art

**vanilladora** - Art

**Polypore64** - Art

**p0rtalz** - Programming

**Buzzbomber_** - Structures

**Zphen** - Logo

Models made with Blockbench
